title: Golden Brown Uruguayan Chicken Skewers
description: A floral and bouncy post-workout Uruguayan dish featuring tahini paste, this recipe is perfect for a quick and healthy meal, with a dash of friendly flavors.
instructions: Preheat the grill to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together tahini paste, olive oil, lemon juice, garlic, paprika, salt, and black pepper.
Add the chicken pieces to the bowl and toss to coat with the tahini mixture.
Thread the chicken pieces onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Grill the skewers for 10-12 minutes, turning occasionally, until the chicken is cooked through and golden brown.
Let the skewers rest for 5 minutes before serving.
Garnish with chopped fresh parsley and serve hot.
Serve with a side of quinoa or rice for a filling meal.
